text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've washed our hands, we can go to
offer our prayers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get in line with Grass Wonder, and before long,
our turn arrives.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now, what to pray for?
choice_data_list: Pray that Grass sharpens her running form.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Being mindful of my condition? How kind of you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Just knowing that you care has brightened
my spirits.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
With this new boost, perhaps I'll start pushing
myself extra hard... Just kidding.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Stronger, you say? You must be expecting big
things from me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm already on my way to becoming a "Beast." If I
get even stronger, I might gobble you up! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Sharper running, is it? Interesting.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's true, I'm now entering my senior year. I'll be
up against all the best racers from here on.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So we must hone my skills to a razor's edge. I'll be
counting on you, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Now that we have made our prayers...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We should be heading back to the academy for
training. But since it's a holiday, why don't we
take our time?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It would be a waste not to fully take in the
celebration.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Let's be off, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us take a stroll through the grounds of
the shrine, replete with the festive mood of New
Year's.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Except... For some reason, Grass Wonder seems
strangely distracted the entire time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me. I believe I fell into a New Year's daze.
Hehe, how careless of me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... why don't we begin with the usual warm
up?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's when she appears.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: A gust of wind! Her signature red!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The swift Phantom Bird has landed on the field of
battle!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's the world's strongest racer! El Condor Pasa, in
the hooouse!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Behind her calm smile burns the spirit of a warrior.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
In the eye of the flamin' whirlwind, the turf is set
aflame! The world is shaken by a deep blue of
unknown!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass Wonder! To the ring!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Is this... another challenge?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Listen, El, I already have plans for today...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh. Ya scared, huh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Think you're gonna relive that shame ya felt at
the Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I saw the whole thing, Grass. Your contienda
against Sei.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And it bored me till I was pullin' at my hair!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My corazón and alma were left utterly unmoved!
Your race was so lacking in heat, I almost caught
a cold!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You don't...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You don't understand a thing, El.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
To be refused the opportunity to even compete!
Denied the chance to claim the "Beast" name!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Look at me, Grass!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I am the Phantom Bird, rápida like lightning, the
strongest in the world!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The barrera gigante that blocks your path to the
top!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A wall you must clear at all costs if you want to
reach your true destination!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Just like Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bein' refused the "Beast" title? What kinda
nonsense is that?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Your objective—the prize you had your eye on
this whole time...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Was it nothin' more than a name?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...Forget it. You're not invited to the ring.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If I face ya when you're like this... it'll just kill the
fire inside me, too.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Adiós.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After El Condor Pasa leaves, Grass Wonder
stands unmoving, as if frozen in place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no approaching her like this. The air
practically crackles around her as she stands
there in silence, until...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if shot out from a cannon, she dashes up to
me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. Do you still have the paper where I wrote
to you my promise?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her voice is soft, but it's impossible to miss the
flames blazing just beneath the surface. If she
means the calligraphy paper with "determination"
written on it, then...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Would you please hand it to me? Right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Chills run down my spine. I pull out the paper as
fast as I can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Snatching it out of my grasp, Grass Wonder holds
up the beautifully written kanji and—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She shreds it in two.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Determination... What a joke.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I was a coward, too timid to keep walking along
the path.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky's shadow loomed too tall, too
grand... and swallowed me whole.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I became trapped by the name "Beast."

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If I truly reach the pinnacle at the end of this
path, titles will come naturally.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I won't hesitate anymore.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's a new year, Trainer, so allow me to renew my
promise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grass Wonder takes out a brush.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Determination.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No matter what walls stand in my way, I will not
flinch before them!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Never again, until the day I reach the top!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I want to try running in the Takarazuka
Kinen as my next race goal. Would that be
acceptable?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As with the Arima, entry is determined by public
vote. What better stage to demonstrate my
renewed determination?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: When I reach the top, everyone will be watching!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I apologize for having worried you.
